lines: Yesu nguriy' ahw ahagaze; Dor' ukw aboshywe n'abanzi be  Umva Pilat' arabaz' ati :Yesu mugirire nte ?
Uramugenza s'ute ?hitamo nonaha ' Naw' utazibaz' ubundi, Uti  Arangenz' ate?
Ibyo na non' ubihitemo ! Wabyemera, wamuhinyura, Cyangwa wamwimika
Ubwo Pilato yashakaga Kwirengagiza guhitamo, Byaramunaniye : naw' ibyo
Petero yaramwihakanye; Ni ko guhitamo nabi pe ! Wowe s' ahubwo ntiwakunda
Yes' umusubize nez' uti :Nd' uwawe, Mwami, ndakwihaye; Umpe kujy' aho
